name: Sonia's Apple Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients together (except the apples and cinnamon) in a mixer, beating until smooth.
2. Pour half the batter into a Bundt pan. Arrange half the apples with some cinnamon sprinkled on top over the batter. Then pour in the remaining batter and top with the remaining apples and cinnamon.
3. Bake at 350 degrees for about 1 1/2 hours.
NOTE: This cake is a good choice to make for a brunch, when you don't have time to fuss, but still want something that both looks and tastes good.
